prove non-commutativity of SO(3) rotations and complex U(3) phases

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: SO(3) rotations are real unitary matrices; pytorch complex128 verifies M†M=I for the embedded SO(3) element; complex structure J (e^{iθ}) distinguishes U(3) from SO(3).

pyg.reason: not used in this pairwise SO(3)↔U(3) coupling probe; other cross-tool coupling deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves that a number cannot be simultaneously purely real (imaginary part = 0) and have nonzero imaginary part; SO(3) and U(3)\SO(3) are structurally separated.

cvc5.reason: not used in this pairwise SO(3)↔U(3) coupling probe; other cross-tool coupling deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sympy verifies J^2 = -I (complex structure defining u(n) from so(2n)); the u(3) algebra contains so(3) plus imaginary generators.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Cl(2,0) has e12^2 = -1 → complex structure; U(1) phase rotation = Cl(2,0) rotor; SO(3)↔U(3) coupling adds this structure.

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: geomstats confirms SO(3) dim=3, SU(3) dim=8; U(3) has dim=9 = SO(3) embedded + 6 complex directions.

e3nn.reason: load-bearing: e3nn SO(3) irreps are real orthogonal representations; U(3) adds complex phase freedom; D^1 at identity vs phase rotation verified.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: rustworkx encodes SO(3)→U(3) as a directed edge; this is the complexification step in the G-tower.

so3_embeds_in_u3.detail: SO(3) rotation as complex matrix: M†M=I → SO(3) ⊂ U(3)

u3_minus_so3_has_complex_phase.detail: Phase matrix diag(e^{iφ},...) is in U(3) but not SO(3) (has imaginary entries)

so3_u3_noncommutativity.detail: R(SO3) ∘ U(U3) ≠ U ∘ R in general: coupling is non-commutative

z3_so3_u3_imaginary_exclusion.detail: z3 UNSAT: SO(3) embedding (Im=0) and U(3)\SO(3) (Im≠0) are disjoint

sympy_J_squared_minus_I.detail: J^2 = -I: J defines the complex structure mapping R^2 → C

sympy_u1_generator.detail: u(1) generator iH is anti-Hermitian (u(n) Lie algebra element)

clifford_complex_structure_J.detail: e12^2 = -1 in Cl(2,0): e12 defines J (complex structure for SO→U step)

e3nn_so3_real_at_identity.detail: SO(3) D^1 Wigner matrix at identity = I: real, no complex phase

geomstats_dimension_difference.detail: SO(3) Lie dim=3; U(3) Lie dim=9: complex structure adds 6 generators

rustworkx_SO3_U3_edge.detail: SO(3)→U(3) directed edge: complexification ratchet step

imaginary_matrix_not_in_SO3.detail: Matrix with pure imaginary entries is in U(3) but not SO(3) (not real)

SO3_in_U3_intersection.detail: Real rotation satisfies M†M=I: SO(3) ⊂ U(3) at the boundary
